value: Thanks for reaching out. I understand how frustrating it is when useful information gets removed from an app—unfortunately, I don't have details about the specific changes made in version 11.1 or Apple's App Store display options on my end. Your best bet would be to contact our Aftersales team via Live Chat or phone at 0344 556 5650, and they can look into what happened with that feature and help you find the information you need.
